2026-04-13T09:44:09.7538782Z hint: Names commonly chosen instead of 'master' are 'main', 'trunk' and
2026-04-13T09:44:09.7539688Z hint: 'development'. The just-created branch can be renamed via this command:
2026-04-13T09:44:09.7540240Z hint:
2026-04-13T09:44:09.7540540Z hint: 	git branch -m <name>
